record.field: info = env['telegram.bot'].get_webhook_info() url = info.get('url', 'Not configured') pending = info.get('pending_update_count', 0) last_error = info.get('last_error_message', '') msg = f"URL: {url}\nPending updates: {pending}" if last_error: msg += f"\nLast error: {last_error}" action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Webhook Status', 'message': msg, 'type': 'info', 'sticky': True, }, }
